---
id: cancel-payment-transfer-intent
title: "Cancel payment transfer intent"
description: "    Cancel a pending payment transfer intent. Once cancelled, the intent cannot be confirmed."
sidebar_label: "Cancel payment transfer intent"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: api/financial/publicsquare-payments-api
custom_edit_url: null
show_extensions: true
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Cancel payment transfer intent"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/payment-transfer-intents/{id}/cancel"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



    Cancel a pending payment transfer intent. Once cancelled, the intent cannot be confirmed.

    ### Permissions
    * `transfer:write`

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
